data.title: XRP Price Unaffected by Institutional Activity Despite $1.4 Billion ETF Inflows
data.description: XRP's price appears to be disconnected from institutional activity, according to recent analysis. According to NS3.AI, more than $1.4 billion has flowed into XRP ETFs since November 2025. Despite this significant inflow, the price of XRP has not shown a corresponding increase. Notably, Goldman Sachs holds $153.8 million across four spot XRP ETF positions, highlighting substantial institutional interest. However, this interest has yet to translate into a noticeable impact on XRP's market value.

data.title: Bhutan Liquidates $120 Million in Bitcoin, Reducing Reserves by 60%
data.description: Bhutan has significantly reduced its Bitcoin holdings, liquidating approximately $120 million since the beginning of the year. According to NS3.AI, this move has decreased Bhutan's digital reserves by over 60% from their peak levels. Recently, 123.7 BTC, valued at around $8.5 million, was transferred to a previously unused address following a larger divestment of 519.7 BTC just 48 hours earlier. Bhutan's Bitcoin holdings have dropped from a high of 13,000 BTC to approximately 4,300 BTC.

data.title: Tokenization Gains Traction Among Wall Street Institutions
data.description: Wall Street banks, exchanges, regulators, and lawmakers are increasingly focusing on tokenization as a key market-structure initiative. According to NS3.AI, BMO is planning to introduce tokenized cash to facilitate 24/7 margin activities, while Nasdaq has received clearance to support certain tokenized stocks and ETFs. Recent regulatory and congressional actions in the U.S. indicate that tokenization is progressing beyond pilot programs, moving towards establishing rules for real-time settlement and collateral utilization.

data.title: Google Sets 2029 Deadline for Post-Quantum Cryptography Transition
data.description: Google has announced a 2029 deadline to transition its authentication services to post-quantum cryptography. According to NS3.AI, this move has intensified scrutiny on blockchains that continue to depend on elliptic-curve signatures. Android 17, Chrome, and Google Cloud have already implemented or support post-quantum protections. Ethereum has outlined an eight-year roadmap featuring weekly developer networks and four hard-fork milestones. In contrast, Bitcoin has yet to establish a coordinated migration plan.

data.title: Market Analysis Suggests Potential Short-Term Bottom for U.S. Stocks
data.description: Citrini Research, the author of the 'End of Day Report,' has shared insights on the market outlook. According to BlockBeats, the analysis suggests that U.S. stocks might reach a short-term bottom on Monday. Furthermore, Citrini Research indicates that the S&P 500 index is unlikely to achieve long-term stability until it falls below 6000 points, although some significant short-term rebounds may occur.

data.title: Citron: US stocks may see a short-term bottom on Monday.
data.description: Citron Research stated in an article on the X platform that the market will not fall in a straight line. The S&P 500 will not stabilize for a long time before falling below 6000 points, but there will be some sharp short-term rebounds in between. US stocks may see a short-term bottom on Monday.

data.title: Israeli Expert Highlights Unity Amid Iran Conflict, Emphasizes Importance of Upcoming Elections
data.description: Israeli security expert Shira Efron has noted that the ongoing conflict with Iran has fostered a sense of unity among Israelis. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting Efron's perspective on the current geopolitical situation. Despite the unifying effect of the conflict, Efron emphasized that the upcoming elections in Israel will play a critical role in shaping the country's future. The elections are expected to address key issues that could impact Israel's domestic and international policies. Efron believes that the outcome will be pivotal in determining how Israel navigates its security challenges and political landscape moving forward.

data.title: India to Expand Regional Connectivity with New Airports and Helipads
data.description: India is set to enhance its regional connectivity by constructing 100 new airports and 200 helipads in smaller towns and cities over the coming years. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting the government's initiative aimed at boosting trade and tourism across the country. This ambitious plan is part of a broader strategy to improve infrastructure and accessibility in less developed areas, thereby fostering economic growth and development. The move is expected to significantly enhance connectivity and provide a substantial boost to local economies by facilitating easier access to remote regions.

data.title: China's Global Influence Questioned Amid Diplomatic Silence on Iran and Venezuela
data.description: China's aspirations to establish itself as a significant global power have been undermined by its lack of diplomatic support for Iran and its silence during U.S. intervention in Venezuela, according to veteran American diplomat Nicholas Burns. Bloomberg posted on X that Burns criticized China's approach, suggesting that its inaction in these international matters raises questions about its commitment to global leadership. The diplomat highlighted that China's failure to engage effectively in these situations could impact its credibility on the world stage. Burns' comments come amid ongoing geopolitical tensions and debates over China's role in international affairs.

data.title: BNB Chain to End Phase 1 of Beacon Chain Recovery Tool in 3 Days, Urges BEP2 Migration
data.description: Key TakeawaysBNB Chain will end Phase 1 of its Beacon Chain recovery tool in 3 days.Users holding BEP2 tokens are advised to migrate assets to BSC.Migration aims to streamline recovery and reduce legacy chain dependencies.Delays may complicate asset recovery after the phase ends.ArticleBNB Chain announced that the first phase of its BNB Beacon Chain recovery tool will cease operation in three days, urging users to complete token migration as soon as possible.According to the update shared on X, users holding BEP2 tokens on the BNB Beacon Chain are advised to transfer their assets to BNB Smart Chain (BSC) to ensure continued access and simplify the recovery process.

data.title: Amber Group Transfers $50 Million USDC to edgeX for Token Buyback
data.description: Two addresses, including one associated with Amber Group, have transferred $50 million USDC to edgeX. According to NS3.AI, the edgeX treasury recently decreased from $190 million to $140 million. The receiving address now holds approximately 75 million USDC. These funds are earmarked for token buyback or market-making activities in anticipation of the EDGE Token Generation Event (TGE) scheduled to occur in three days.

data.title: Binance Alpha will list BASED on March 30th.
data.description: According to official sources, Binance Alpha will list BASED on March 30.

data.title: Crypto Developments: Balancer's DAO Shift, Lido's Buyback, and Aave's Revenue Proposal
data.description:
Recent developments in the cryptocurrency sector have seen significant strategic shifts among key players. Balancer is transitioning to a decentralized autonomous organization (DAO) architecture, aiming to enhance governance and operational efficiency. According to NS3.AI, this move is expected to streamline decision-making processes and empower community involvement.

Lido has announced a planned buyback program, which is anticipated to bolster its token value and increase investor confidence. This initiative reflects Lido's commitment to maintaining a robust market position and addressing shareholder interests.

Aave has proposed directing 100% of its revenue to the DAO, a strategy designed to reinforce its decentralized governance model and ensure sustainable growth. This proposal underscores Aave's dedication to aligning its financial resources with community-driven objectives.

In commodity trading, Hyperliquid has reached a new all-time high, signaling strong market demand and increased trading activity. This milestone highlights the growing interest in digital commodities and the potential for further expansion in this sector.

Franklin Templeton is advancing its efforts in tokenized exchange-traded funds (ETFs), aiming to leverage blockchain technology for enhanced transparency and efficiency in fund management. This initiative marks a significant step towards integrating traditional financial products with innovative digital solutions.

Solana has launched an enterprise platform, designed to cater to business needs and facilitate blockchain adoption across various industries. This platform is expected to drive enterprise-level engagement and promote the use of blockchain technology in corporate environments.

data.title: Bitcoin Whale From 2013 Transfers 500 BTC to Binance, Extends Ongoing Sell-Off
data.description: A long-term Bitcoin holder from 2013 has continued to offload holdings, transferring another 500 BTC to Binance, according to data from Arkham.The wallet, which accumulated approximately 5,000 BTC at an average price of $332 per coin, has been gradually reducing its position. The latest transfer follows a previous movement of 1,000 BTC to Binance roughly one week earlier.

data.title: Binance OTC Volume Surges as Institutional Bitcoin Demand Accelerates in 2026
data.description: Key TakeawaysBinance OTC volume reached 25% of 2025 total in just two months.Bitcoin share of OTC trading jumped from 4.91% in January to 45.81% in February.Rising stablecoin and fiat inflows संकेत institutional dip-buying activity.Large trades show improved execution efficiency, including a $105M swap with reduced slippage.Binance reported a sharp increase in over-the-counter (OTC) trading activity, signaling accelerating institutional participation in the Bitcoin market.According to Binance’s March 2026 OTC and Execution Services Report, trading volume in the first two months of the year has already reached 25% of total OTC volume recorded in 2025, highlighting growing reliance on OTC channels by large investors.The data shows a significant shift toward Bitcoin. BTC’s share of OTC trading surged from 4.91% in January to 45.81% in February, indicating strong institutional demand despite ongoing market volatility.During this period, Bitcoin traded in a wide range between $60,000 and $78,000, driven by macroeconomic uncertainty and geopolitical developments. However, rising stablecoin and fiat inflows suggest institutions were actively accumulating during price dips.Binance also highlighted improvements in execution efficiency for large transactions. In one case, a $105 million WBETH-to-ETH swap was completed within two hours with approximately 50 basis points of slippage, representing a 75% improvement compared to traditional order book execution.The report characterizes the current market environment as “price volatility combined with institutional accumulation,” with OTC desks playing an increasingly critical role in facilitating large trades and managing liquidity without disrupting market prices.The trend suggests that while retail sentiment remains cautious, institutional capital continues to build exposure to Bitcoin through off-exchange channels.

data.title: Binance Alpha to List R2 Protocol (R2) on March 30 With Airdrop Access
data.description: Binance announced that its Alpha platform will list R2 Protocol (R2) on March 30, expanding its lineup of early-stage and ecosystem tokens.According to the official statement, eligible users will be able to claim R2 tokens through an airdrop using Binance Alpha Points once trading begins. The claim process will take place on the Alpha Events page.

data.title: India-Bound LPG Tankers Navigate Strait of Hormuz
data.description: Two additional tankers carrying liquefied petroleum gas (LPG) destined for India have successfully passed through the Strait of Hormuz, a crucial maritime passage in the Persian Gulf. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting the ongoing movement of vessels through this strategic waterway. The Strait of Hormuz is a vital corridor for global energy shipments, and the passage of these tankers underscores the continued flow of LPG to India despite regional tensions. The movement of these tankers is part of a broader pattern of maritime activity in the area, reflecting the importance of the Strait in international trade.

data.title: Senator Lummis Defends Digital Asset Market Clarity Act Amid Criticism
data.description:
U.S. Senator Cynthia Lummis has refuted claims that the Digital Asset Market Clarity Act fails to safeguard decentralized finance (DeFi) innovators from legal challenges. According to Cointelegraph, she emphasized that recent amendments to the draft will provide unprecedented protection for DeFi and developers. Her remarks on Friday were a direct response to crypto lawyer Jake Chervinsky, who contended that Title 3 of the current draft undermines the Blockchain Regulatory Certainty Act (BRCA) by imposing know-your-customer (KYC) requirements on non-custodial software developers.

Lummis urged the public not to believe the fear, uncertainty, and doubt (FUD), stating, "We have worked on a bipartisan basis for the last few weeks to make changes to Title 3 that make this bill the strongest protection for DeFi and developers ever enacted. We have to pass the Clarity Act to get these protections." However, the latest revisions to the CLARITY Act have not been publicly disclosed.

Chervinsky expressed concern that the DeFi protection provisions have been overshadowed by the intense focus on stablecoin rewards provisions within the CLARITY Act. His primary issue with the Senate Banking Committee’s latest draft is that Title 3's definitions of money transmitters could still expose many non-custodial DeFi builders to liability. Despite the CLARITY Act incorporating the BRCA in section 604, which specifies that non-controlling developers and providers of non-custodial software should not be classified as financial institutions subject to Bank Secrecy Act KYC obligations, Chervinsky argued that ensuring non-custodial software developers aren't misclassified as money transmitters remains a critical challenge.

His concerns arise amid several high-profile prosecutions and convictions of developers in the U.S. in recent months, including the conviction of Tornado Cash co-founder Roman Storm in August 2025 for conspiracy to operate an unlicensed money transmitting business. U.S. lawmakers have indicated that the CLARITY Act is progressing towards a Senate Banking Committee markup expected in April, following recent bipartisan advancements on stablecoin rewards provisions. Lummis highlighted the necessity of passing the CLARITY Act to ensure DeFi developers receive legal protections under the BRCA.

data.title: Circle Unfreezes Additional Wallets Amid Dfinity Bridge Concerns
data.description: Blockchain sleuth ZachXBT posted on X that Circle has unfrozen two more hot wallets associated with the ckUSDC on the Dfinity bridge, along with one unidentified wallet. This development follows previous actions by Circle to address issues related to the Dfinity bridge. The move is part of ongoing efforts to ensure the security and functionality of digital assets linked to the bridge. ZachXBT's update highlights the continued scrutiny and adjustments being made by Circle in response to the situation.
